VAL-CLI-001.evidence: paperclipai issue --help shows 'next [options] Show next tasks grouped by ready/active/blocked status'

VAL-CLI-002.evidence: Command output groups issues into three categories: READY (todo), ACTIVE (in progress/review), BLOCKED

VAL-CLI-003.evidence: Each task item output includes: identifier (or id), title, status (via category), priority, and assigneeAgentId

VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: GitHub templates exist (.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/), task-discovery doc exists (doc/TASK-DISCOVERY.md), CLI command registered and functional

VAL-CROSS-002.evidence: doc/TASK-DISCOVERY.md contains 'Where Work Enters' section explaining GitHub issue templates flow, and 'Flow Summary' showing complete workflow
